title: 1.5 Billion Dollar Settlement Finalized: Judge Approves Anthropic Book Plagiarism Case, Compensating About $3,000 Per Book, Setting a Key Copyright Precedent for AI Training
excerpt: A copyright battle that has captured the entire AI industry has finally reached a verdict. A report from Associated Press in San Francisco shows that a federal
content_html:
A copyright battle that has captured the entire AI industry has finally reached a verdict. A report from Associated Press in San Francisco shows that a federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement agreement for Anthropic: the artificial intelligence company will pay approximately $3,000 per book to thousands of authors for using unauthorized copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

In Monday's ruling, the presiding district court judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín stated that this class-action settlement provides meaningful relief to affected authors and publishers. The distribution of the money is now clear — about 91% of the more than 482,000 books covered by the ruling have already been claimed by authors or publishers, who are now in line for compensation.

Justin Nelson, lead attorney for the plaintiffs, said in a statement that this settlement is the largest known copyright recovery in history and expressed anticipation for the swift distribution to collective members. The weight of this statement lies in the fact that it brings the scale of compensation in an AI training data infringement case to the forefront of copyright history.

Looking back at the path that led to the ruling reveals the legal reasoning behind this settlement. In September last year, U.S. District Court Judge William Alsup in San Francisco gave preliminary approval, after which he retired. Alsup had previously issued a mixed ruling in the summer of last year: on one hand, he determined that training AI chatbots with copyrighted books was not illegal; on the other hand, he ruled that Anthropic obtained millions of books through unauthorized websites, which was itself unjustifiable. The distinction between lawful training and unlawful acquisition became the most critical legal pivot in the case.

Anthropic's response to the ruling focused on confirming the legality of the training. Aparna Sridhar, the company's Deputy General Counsel, emphasized that the ruling is a milestone, indicating that training AI with books falls under fair use under copyright law. For Anthropic and the entire large model industry, this statement is worth more than the $1.5 billion price tag — it means that the judiciary has given a favorable endorsement to the training activities that have already taken place.

When the $1.5 billion settlement is approved by the judge and the $3,000 per book compensation is about to be distributed, the real legacy left by this lawsuit is not the check itself, but two lines it has drawn: obtaining data through piracy is costly and unjustifiable, while training models through legal means is gradually recognized as fair use by the judiciary. The space between these two lines is where every AI company must tread carefully in the future.

blocks.html_en: A copyright battle that has captured the entire AI industry has finally reached a verdict. A report from Associated Press in San Francisco shows that a federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement agreement for Anthropic: the artificial intelligence company will pay approximately $3,000 per book to thousands of authors for using unauthorized copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

sentences.en: A copyright battle that has captured the entire AI industry has finally reached a verdict.
sentences.zh: 一场席卷整个AI行业的版权之争终于有了结果。

sentences.en: A report from Associated Press in San Francisco shows that a federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement agreement for Anthropic: the artificial intelligence company will pay approximately $3,000 per book to thousands of authors for using unauthorized copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.
sentences.zh: 美联社旧金山报道显示，一名联邦法官已批准 Anthropic 一项价值 15 亿美元的版权和解协议：这家人工智能公司将向数千名作者支付每本书约 3000 美元的费用，因为他们使用未经授权的作品副本来训练其 Claude 聊天机器人。

blocks.html_en: In Monday's ruling, the presiding district court judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín stated that this class-action settlement provides meaningful relief to affected authors and publishers. The distribution of the money is now clear — about 91% of the more than 482,000 books covered by the ruling have already been claimed by authors or publishers, who are now in line for compensation.

sentences.en: In Monday's ruling, the presiding district court judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín stated that this class-action settlement provides meaningful relief to affected authors and publishers.
sentences.zh: 在周一的裁决中，地方法院主审法官阿拉塞利·马丁内斯-奥尔金表示，这项集体诉讼和解协议为受影响的作者和出版商提供了有意义的救济。

sentences.en: The distribution of the money is now clear — about 91% of the more than 482,000 books covered by the ruling have already been claimed by authors or publishers, who are now in line for compensation.
sentences.zh: 这笔钱的分配现在已经很清楚了——在该裁决所涉及的 482,000 多本书中，大约 91% 已经被作者或出版商认领，他们现在正在排队领取赔偿。

blocks.html_en: Justin Nelson, lead attorney for the plaintiffs, said in a statement that this settlement is the largest known copyright recovery in history and expressed anticipation for the swift distribution to collective members. The weight of this statement lies in the fact that it brings the scale of compensation in an AI training data infringement case to the forefront of copyright history.

sentences.en: Justin Nelson, lead attorney for the plaintiffs, said in a statement that this settlement is the largest known copyright recovery in history and expressed anticipation for the swift distribution to collective members.
sentences.zh: 原告的首席律师贾斯汀·尼尔森在一份声明中表示，这项和解是历史上已知的最大的版权追回案，并表示期待迅速分发给集体成员。

sentences.en: The weight of this statement lies in the fact that it brings the scale of compensation in an AI training data infringement case to the forefront of copyright history.
sentences.zh: 这一声明的分量在于，它将人工智能训练数据侵权案的赔偿规模推向了版权史上的前列。

blocks.html_en: Looking back at the path that led to the ruling reveals the legal reasoning behind this settlement. In September last year, U.S. District Court Judge William Alsup in San Francisco gave preliminary approval, after which he retired. Alsup had previously issued a mixed ruling in the summer of last year: on one hand, he determined that training AI chatbots with copyrighted books was not illegal; on the other hand, he ruled that Anthropic obtained millions of books through unauthorized websites, which was itself unjustifiable. The distinction between lawful training and unlawful acquisition became the most critical legal pivot in the case.

sentences.en: Looking back at the path that led to the ruling reveals the legal reasoning behind this settlement.
sentences.zh: 回顾导致裁决的过程，揭示了这一和解背后的法律推理。

sentences.en: In September last year, U.S. District Court Judge William Alsup in San Francisco gave preliminary approval, after which he retired.
sentences.zh: 去年9月，美国旧金山地方法院法官威廉·阿尔苏普初步批准了这一决定，随后他退休了。

sentences.en: Alsup had previously issued a mixed ruling in the summer of last year: on one hand, he determined that training AI chatbots with copyrighted books was not illegal; on the other hand, he ruled that Anthropic obtained millions of books through unauthorized websites, which was itself unjustifiable.
sentences.zh: Alsup 此前曾于去年夏天发布过一项混合裁决：一方面，他认定用受版权保护的书籍训练人工智能聊天机器人并不违法；另一方面，他认定用受版权保护的书籍训练人工智能聊天机器人并不违法；另一方面，他裁定Anthropic通过未经授权的网站获取了数百万本书，这本身就是不合理的。

sentences.en: The distinction between lawful training and unlawful acquisition became the most critical legal pivot in the case.
sentences.zh: 合法训练与非法获取的区别成为本案最关键的法律支点。

blocks.html_en: Anthropic's response to the ruling focused on confirming the legality of the training. Aparna Sridhar, the company's Deputy General Counsel, emphasized that the ruling is a milestone, indicating that training AI with books falls under fair use under copyright law. For Anthropic and the entire large model industry, this statement is worth more than the $1.5 billion price tag — it means that the judiciary has given a favorable endorsement to the training activities that have already taken place.

sentences.en: Anthropic's response to the ruling focused on confirming the legality of the training.
sentences.zh: Anthropic对裁决的回应重点是确认培训的合法性。

sentences.en: Aparna Sridhar, the company's Deputy General Counsel, emphasized that the ruling is a milestone, indicating that training AI with books falls under fair use under copyright law.
sentences.zh: 该公司副总法律顾问 Aparna Sridhar 强调，这一裁决是一个里程碑，表明用书籍训练人工智能属于版权法下的合理使用范围。

sentences.en: For Anthropic and the entire large model industry, this statement is worth more than the $1.5 billion price tag — it means that the judiciary has given a favorable endorsement to the training activities that have already taken place.
sentences.zh: 对于Anthropic以及整个大型模特行业来说，这一声明的价值超过了15亿美元的标价——这意味着司法部门对已经开展的培训活动给予了有利的认可。

blocks.html_en: When the $1.5 billion settlement is approved by the judge and the $3,000 per book compensation is about to be distributed, the real legacy left by this lawsuit is not the check itself, but two lines it has drawn: obtaining data through piracy is costly and unjustifiable, while training models through legal means is gradually recognized as fair use by the judiciary. The space between these two lines is where every AI company must tread carefully in the future.

sentences.en: When the $1.5 billion settlement is approved by the judge and the $3,000 per book compensation is about to be distributed, the real legacy left by this lawsuit is not the check itself, but two lines it has drawn: obtaining data through piracy is costly and unjustifiable, while training models through legal means is gradually recognized as fair use by the judiciary.
sentences.zh: 当15亿美元的和解协议获得法官批准，每本书3000美元的赔偿金即将发放时，这场诉讼留下的真正遗产不是支票本身，而是它划下的两条底线：通过盗版获取数据成本高昂且不合理，而通过合法手段训练模型逐渐被司法部门认定为合理使用。

sentences.en: The space between these two lines is where every AI company must tread carefully in the future.
sentences.zh: 这两条线之间的空间是未来每个人工智能公司必须谨慎行走的地方。

content_html_zh:
一场席卷整个AI行业的版权之争终于有了结果。 美联社旧金山报道显示，一名联邦法官已批准 Anthropic 一项价值 15 亿美元的版权和解协议：这家人工智能公司将向数千名作者支付每本书约 3000 美元的费用，因为他们使用未经授权的作品副本来训练其 Claude 聊天机器人。

在周一的裁决中，地方法院主审法官阿拉塞利·马丁内斯-奥尔金表示，这项集体诉讼和解协议为受影响的作者和出版商提供了有意义的救济。 这笔钱的分配现在已经很清楚了——在该裁决所涉及的 482,000 多本书中，大约 91% 已经被作者或出版商认领，他们现在正在排队领取赔偿。

原告的首席律师贾斯汀·尼尔森在一份声明中表示，这项和解是历史上已知的最大的版权追回案，并表示期待迅速分发给集体成员。 这一声明的分量在于，它将人工智能训练数据侵权案的赔偿规模推向了版权史上的前列。

回顾导致裁决的过程，揭示了这一和解背后的法律推理。 去年9月，美国旧金山地方法院法官威廉·阿尔苏普初步批准了这一决定，随后他退休了。 Alsup 此前曾于去年夏天发布过一项混合裁决：一方面，他认定用受版权保护的书籍训练人工智能聊天机器人并不违法；另一方面，他认定用受版权保护的书籍训练人工智能聊天机器人并不违法；另一方面，他裁定Anthropic通过未经授权的网站获取了数百万本书，这本身就是不合理的。 合法训练与非法获取的区别成为本案最关键的法律支点。

Anthropic对裁决的回应重点是确认培训的合法性。 该公司副总法律顾问 Aparna Sridhar 强调，这一裁决是一个里程碑，表明用书籍训练人工智能属于版权法下的合理使用范围。 对于Anthropic以及整个大型模特行业来说，这一声明的价值超过了15亿美元的标价——这意味着司法部门对已经开展的培训活动给予了有利的认可。

当15亿美元的和解协议获得法官批准，每本书3000美元的赔偿金即将发放时，这场诉讼留下的真正遗产不是支票本身，而是它划下的两条底线：通过盗版获取数据成本高昂且不合理，而通过合法手段训练模型逐渐被司法部门认定为合理使用。 这两条线之间的空间是未来每个人工智能公司必须谨慎行走的地方。
